name: voice-training-mobile
description: 声乐训练 Android/iOS 打包工程。

scripts.android:add: npm run mobile:prepare && cap add android && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/patch-capacitor-android.ps1
scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && cap sync android && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/patch-capacitor-android.ps1
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
